name: copilot-bridge
description: Consult a signed-in Microsoft 365 Copilot from Codex through the local Copilot Bridge.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Microsoft 365 Copilot for a second opinion.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the locally installed Copilot Bridge, which uses the signed-in Microsoft 365 Copilot tab in the user's daily Edge profile.
defaultPrompt: Ask Copilot to review this design, then adjudicate its advice.
Check whether this implementation is overengineered.
